goal: Add a side-effect-free in-memory audit artifact builder for cockpit patch consume execution receipt records without writing audits, applying patches, mutating server/routes, or consuming permits.
scope_out: Do not persist audits, perform durable receipt writes, consume permits, apply patches, mutate server files, mutate route files, call providers, call DB, call GitHub, change package files, workflows, deployment files, or write runtime artifacts.
claims: Cockpit patch consume execution receipt record audit authority artifacts can produce an in-memory audit artifact.
Audited-at ref and audit evidence ref are required.
Audit writes, patch application, server mutation, route mutation, permit consumption, and durable persistence remain false.
assumptions: Durable audit persistence and audit receipts require later task locks.
dod: Ready, missing audited-at ref, and blocked authority cases are tested.
Focused test, typecheck, task-lock verify, diff-check, and full builder tests pass.
stop_conditions: Audit persistence, durable receipt write, permit consumption, patch application, server mutation, route mutation, external calls, DB, GitHub, package, workflow, deployment, or runtime write changes become necessary.
prior_task_findings: BPK-163 produced side-effect-free cockpit patch consume execution receipt record audit authority artifacts.
